_README: DISABLED SCAFFOLDING — not installed by install.sh and not loaded by Claude Code. When you want an integration, copy the relevant entry into ~/.claude/.mcp.json (under an `mcpServers` object), fill in credentials, and put secrets in ~/.claude/mcp.local.json (gitignored) rather than committing them. See repo README section 'Enabling MCP'.

figma_OFFICIAL._about: Official Figma remote MCP server (write-to-canvas beta — becoming usage-based/paid; confirm your plan covers cost before enabling). The official Figma Claude Code plugin (figma@claude-plugins-official, installed via ./install.sh --plugins) registers this server automatically after OAuth — only add this entry manually if you need MCP without the plugin. To enable via plugin: install the plugin, open any Figma file, authorise Claude Code in the plugin panel, then /mcp to confirm connection. To enable manually: copy this entry into ~/.claude/.mcp.json and run `claude mcp add --transport http figma https://mcp.figma.com/mcp`.

figma_COMMUNITY_ALTERNATIVE._about: Community plugin-bridge MCP servers — free-plan / no-rate-limit alternative to the official remote MCP. Both require Figma Desktop running with a custom plugin imported over WebSocket. No usage billing but more setup and no official support. Options: southleft/figma-console-mcp (~106 write tools, variables/tokens, DTCG export) or vkhanhqui/figma-mcp-go (73 tools, text-to-design). Use the official entry above unless you are on a free Figma plan or need raw Plugin-API escape hatches.

atlassian_cloud_OFFICIAL._about: Official Atlassian Rovo remote MCP (hosted, OAuth on first connect, Jira+Confluence+Compass). Cloud only (*.atlassian.net). Install via CLI: `claude mcp add --transport http atlassian https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp`

atlassian_datacenter_ALTERNATIVE._about: Community sooperset/mcp-atlassian — required for self-hosted Jira/Confluence Server/Data Center (also supports Cloud). Auth via API token (Cloud) or PAT (DC).

postgres_RECOMMENDED._about: crystaldba/postgres-mcp (Postgres MCP Pro): schema exploration, EXPLAIN, index tuning, health checks. Defaults to restricted/read-only — good for prod. The old @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres is archived; do not use it.

mysql_OPTION_node._about: benborla/mcp-server-mysql (Node/npx). Read-only by default; writes opt-in via ALLOW_*_OPERATION env flags. Node 20+, MySQL 5.7+.

mysql_OPTION_python._about: designcomputer/mysql_mcp_server (Python/uvx). Most recent release, built-in SSH tunneling. Install via `claude mcp add --transport stdio mysql uvx mysql_mcp_server`.
